RimLogging.ChannelDef.label: Default
RimLogging.ChannelDef.description: Catch-all channel for callers that don't specify one.

RimLogging.ChannelDef.label: Vanilla RimWorld
RimLogging.ChannelDef.description: Verse.Log calls from Assembly-CSharp or core/DLC.

RimLogging.ChannelDef.label: Unity engine
RimLogging.ChannelDef.description: UnityEngine.Debug.Log entries captured via threaded callback.
